description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named build that triggers on push and pull request events. Run a multi-job workflow with four jobs: msvc, mingw, linux, and macos, each on a different environment (windows-latest, windows-latest, ubuntu-latest, and macOS-latest respectively). For each job, check out the repository with submodules, perform environment-specific setup, install dependencies, compile using ninja, copy build artifacts, and upload them as a bee artifact.
